narrative:
Rocky River City has 16,435 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.0%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.4 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +10.1% D−R vs +3.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
